name: Sweet Like Candy
description:
Rika, Aiko and Yumiko are three idol girls in the (fictional) J-Pop girl group called Sweet Like Candy

Rika is the leader who is fun, loving and optimistic 

Aiko is sweet and bubbly and loves pastels

Yumiko is more aloof and blunt and finds humor in sarcasm.
